one_liner: Calendar-integrated agent that prices every meeting in real $, scores decisions-per-hour, and auto-converts low-value recurrings to async.
problem: Mid-market companies waste $250B+/yr in unproductive meetings. r/Entrepreneur thread on this hit 89K upvotes / 12K comments. People-managers can name the problem but lack quantified, per-meeting evidence to push back, and no system enforces hygiene at the calendar layer.
solution: OAuth into Google/Microsoft calendars + HRIS for salary bands. Compute a real $-cost per invite using attendee bands, score outcome density via meeting-doc + transcript analysis, and surface a weekly leaderboard + auto-suggest 'cancel/shrink/async' actions one-click-applied to the calendar.
target_customer: VP People / Chief of Staff at 500-5000 person tech-forward firms in NA/EU.
